title: Analyze, improve, and deploy application
body: ## Description This pull request addresses two critical issues to improve the application's maintainability, SEO foundation, and build stability: 1. **`index.html` Duplication**: The `index.html` file contained two complete HTML documents, which could lead to unpredictable rendering, SEO penalties, and build warnings. This has been consolidated into a single, well-structured HTML document, merging and optimizing meta tags (SEO, OpenGraph, Twitter, canonical), preconnect/preload links, and manifest/favicon declarations. 2. **`tailwind.config.ts` Duplicate Color**: A redundant `zion-purple` color definition was present in `tailwind.config.ts`, which could cause configuration conflicts or unexpected styling. The duplicate entry has been removed. ## Type of Change - [x] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) -
